desc.de: Isoliertes Netzwerk. Subnets, Route Tables, Security Groups, NACLs, VPN, Direct Connect, VPC Peering, VPC Flow Logs, IPv6 Dual-Stack, VPC Endpoints.
desc.en: Isolated network. Subnets, route tables, security groups, NACLs, VPN, Direct Connect, VPC Peering, VPC Flow Logs, IPv6 dual-stack, VPC Endpoints.

otcDesc.de: CIDR-Blöcke, Subnets (DHCP-basiert), Security Groups (stateful, bis 20 Regeln/Gruppe default), Firewalls (Subnet-ACLs, stateless, 5-Tupel Allow/Deny), VPN, Direct Connect, VPC Peering (nur intra-Region), Enterprise Router (ER) für Cross-VPC, VPC Flow Logs (nach LTS), IPv6 Dual-Stack (eingeschränkt).
otcDesc.en: CIDR blocks, subnets (DHCP-based), security groups (stateful, up to 20 rules/group default), firewalls (subnet ACLs, stateless, 5-tuple allow/deny), VPN, Direct Connect, VPC Peering (intra-region only), Enterprise Router (ER) for cross-VPC, VPC Flow Logs (to LTS), IPv6 dual-stack (limited).

migration.de: **Security Groups.** Max 20 Regeln/Gruppe (erweiterbar), max 400 pro Projekt. CIDR-Bereiche können nach VPC-Erstellung nicht geändert werden. **Network ACLs.** AWS NACLs → OTC 'Firewalls' (Subnet-Level, stateless, 5-Tupel, Allow/Deny) — funktional identisch. **Peering & Routing.** VPC Peering nur intra-Region — für Cross-Region Enterprise Router (ER) nutzen. NAT Gateway ist ein separater Service. **Flow Logs.** Gehen nach LTS mit weniger Feldern als AWS, kein S3-Export. **Fehlend.** IPv6 Dual-Stack nur eingeschränkt verfügbar. Kein VPC Lattice.
migration.en: **Security groups.** Max 20 rules/group (expandable), max 400 per project. CIDR ranges cannot be changed after VPC creation. **Network ACLs.** AWS NACLs → OTC 'Firewalls' (subnet-level, stateless, 5-tuple, allow/deny) — functionally identical. **Peering & routing.** VPC Peering intra-region only — use Enterprise Router (ER) for cross-region. NAT Gateway is a separate service. **Flow Logs.** Go to LTS with fewer fields than AWS, no S3 export. **Missing.** IPv6 dual-stack limited availability. No VPC Lattice.

desc.de: Traffic-Verteilung. ALB (L7, HTTP/HTTPS, Path/Host-based Routing), NLB (L4, TCP/UDP/TLS, ultra-low latency), GLB (Gateway, transparent inspection). Health Checks, Sticky Sessions, WAF-Integration.
desc.en: Traffic distribution. ALB (L7, HTTP/HTTPS, path/host-based routing), NLB (L4, TCP/UDP/TLS, ultra-low latency), GLB (Gateway, transparent inspection). Health checks, sticky sessions, WAF integration.

otcDesc.de: Dedicated ELB (exklusive Ressourcen, bis 20 Mio. Connections/AZ) und Shared ELB (Cluster, günstiger). L4 (TCP/UDP) + L7 (HTTP/HTTPS). Dedicated unterstützt: QUIC, HTTP/2, TLS 1.3, SNI, Path/Host-based Routing (L7 Policies), Weighted Backend Groups, IP-Backend (Cross-VPC). WebSocket nur bei Dedicated. EU-NL nur Dedicated.
otcDesc.en: Dedicated ELB (exclusive resources, up to 20M connections/AZ) and Shared ELB (cluster, cheaper). L4 (TCP/UDP) + L7 (HTTP/HTTPS). Dedicated supports: QUIC, HTTP/2, TLS 1.3, SNI, path/host-based routing (L7 policies), weighted backend groups, IP backend (cross-VPC). WebSocket only with Dedicated. EU-NL Dedicated only.

migration.de: **ELB-Typen.** OTC bietet Shared (Classic), Dedicated und Dedicated (WAF). Für Produktion Dedicated verwenden. **Layer-7-Migration.** ALB-Features (Path-/Host-based Routing) → Dedicated ELB mit L7-Policies. NLB (TCP/UDP) → Dedicated ELB TCP Listener. **Verhaltensunterschiede.** Sticky Sessions sind Cookie-basiert mit anderer Konfiguration. WebSocket-Support nur bei Dedicated ELB. Cross-Zone Load Balancing ist Standard und nicht abschaltbar. Target Group Health Checks haben andere Parameter. **Fehlend.** Gateway Load Balancer existiert nicht.
migration.en: **ELB types.** OTC offers Shared (Classic), Dedicated, and Dedicated (WAF). Use Dedicated for production. **Layer 7 migration.** ALB features (path/host-based routing) → Dedicated ELB with L7 policies. NLB (TCP/UDP) → Dedicated ELB TCP Listener. **Behavioral differences.** Sticky Sessions are cookie-based with different configuration. WebSocket support only with Dedicated ELB. Cross-zone load balancing is default and cannot be disabled. Target group health checks have different parameters. **Missing.** Gateway Load Balancer does not exist.

desc.de: Dedizierte Netzwerkverbindung zwischen On-Premises und AWS. Private/Public VIF, LAG, Direct Connect Gateway.
desc.en: Dedicated network connection between on-premises and AWS. Private/public VIF, LAG, Direct Connect Gateway.

otcDesc.de: Dedizierte Netzwerkverbindung zwischen On-Premises und OTC. Virtual Gateway, Virtual Interface, Hosted/Standard Connect.
otcDesc.en: Dedicated network connection between on-premises and OTC. Virtual gateway, virtual interface, hosted/standard connect.

migration.de: **Bestellprozess.** OTC Direct Connect wird über T-Systems/Partner bestellt — Vorlaufzeit mehrere Wochen. Nur Standorte in DE/EU verfügbar (weniger PoPs als AWS). **BGP-Konfiguration.** ASN-Bereiche können abweichen — vor Migration prüfen. LAG (Link Aggregation Group) funktioniert ähnlich. **Routing-Mapping.** Virtual Interfaces (Public/Private) → Direct Connect Virtual Gateway + VPC-Attachment. Transit VIF → Enterprise Router mit Direct Connect. **Fehlend.** MACsec-Verschlüsselung nicht verfügbar.
migration.en: **Ordering process.** OTC Direct Connect is ordered via T-Systems/partners — lead time several weeks. Only locations in DE/EU available (fewer PoPs than AWS). **BGP configuration.** ASN ranges may differ — check before migration. LAG (Link Aggregation Group) works similarly. **Routing mapping.** Virtual Interfaces (Public/Private) → Direct Connect Virtual Gateway + VPC attachment. Transit VIF → Enterprise Router with Direct Connect. **Missing.** MACsec encryption not available.

tfNote.de: Connection und Virtual Interface per TF, aber BGP-Konfiguration und physische Bereitstellung nicht per TF automatisierbar.
tfNote.en: Connection and virtual interface via TF, but BGP configuration and physical provisioning not automatable via TF.

desc.de: Zentraler Netzwerk-Hub für VPC-zu-VPC, VPN und Direct Connect. Route Tables, Peering, Multicast.
desc.en: Central network hub for VPC-to-VPC, VPN and Direct Connect. Route tables, peering, multicast.

otcDesc.de: Zentraler Netzwerk-Hub. VPC-Attachments, Route Tables, Propagations, Associations, Cross-Account Sharing, Flow Logs.
otcDesc.en: Central network hub. VPC attachments, route tables, propagations, associations, cross-account sharing, flow logs.

migration.de: **Kernfunktionen.** Enterprise Router (ER) deckt VPC/VPN/DC-Attachments, Route Tables mit Propagation (auto + manuell) und Associations sowie Cross-Account Sharing ab. **Ressourcen-Mapping.** TGW Attachments → ER Connections (VPC, VPN, Virtual Gateway, CFW). TGW Route Tables → ER Route Tables (mit Propagation und Association). ER unterstützt auch Flow Logs. **Fehlend.** Kein Transit Gateway Peering über Regionen, kein TGW Multicast, kein Network Manager, kein TGW Connect (GRE).
migration.en: **Core features.** Enterprise Router (ER) covers VPC/VPN/DC attachments, route tables with propagation (auto + manual) and associations, plus cross-account sharing. **Resource mapping.** TGW Attachments → ER Connections (VPC, VPN, Virtual Gateway, CFW). TGW Route Tables → ER Route Tables (with propagation and association). ER also supports flow logs. **Missing.** No Transit Gateway Peering across regions, no TGW Multicast, no Network Manager, no TGW Connect (GRE).

equivNote.de: Enterprise Router deckt VPC-Attachments, Route Tables mit Propagation/Association, Cross-Account Sharing und Flow Logs ab. Fehlend: Multicast, Cross-Region Peering, Network Manager, TGW Connect (GRE).
equivNote.en: Enterprise Router covers VPC attachments, route tables with propagation/association, cross-account sharing, and flow logs. Missing: multicast, cross-region peering, Network Manager, TGW Connect (GRE).

desc.de: Managed NAT für ausgehenden Internet-Traffic aus privaten Subnets. SNAT und DNAT.
desc.en: Managed NAT for outbound internet traffic from private subnets. SNAT and DNAT.

otcDesc.de: Managed NAT Gateway. SNAT-Regeln für ausgehenden Traffic, DNAT-Regeln für Port Forwarding. EIP-basiert.
otcDesc.en: Managed NAT Gateway. SNAT rules for outbound traffic, DNAT rules for port forwarding. EIP-based.

migration.de: **Regel-Konfiguration.** SNAT- und DNAT-Regeln werden separat konfiguriert (nicht automatisch wie bei AWS). Max 200 SNAT/DNAT-Regeln pro NAT Gateway. Elastic IPs müssen vorher erstellt und zugewiesen werden. **Private NAT.** Private NAT Gateway (VPC-zu-VPC ohne Internet) ist ein separater Service. **Kostenmodell.** Abrechnung nach Verbindungen + Traffic, nicht pauschal pro Stunde wie AWS.
migration.en: **Rule configuration.** SNAT and DNAT rules are configured separately (not automatic like AWS). Max 200 SNAT/DNAT rules per NAT Gateway. Elastic IPs must be created and assigned beforehand. **Private NAT.** Private NAT Gateway (VPC-to-VPC without internet) is a separate service. **Cost model.** Billed by connections + traffic, not flat hourly rate like AWS.

desc.de: Managed IPSec VPN. Zwei Tunnel pro Connection, BGP/Static Routing, Accelerated VPN (Global Accelerator), VPN CloudHub.
desc.en: Managed IPSec VPN. Two tunnels per connection, BGP/static routing, Accelerated VPN (Global Accelerator), VPN CloudHub.

otcDesc.de: Managed IPSec VPN Gateway. IKEv1/IKEv2, IPSec Policies, Site-to-Site Tunnel. Unterstützt BGP und Static Routing.
otcDesc.en: Managed IPSec VPN Gateway. IKEv1/IKEv2, IPSec policies, site-to-site tunnel. Supports BGP and static routing.

migration.de: **Site-to-Site VPN.** OTC VPN Gateway unterstützt IPsec IKEv1/v2 und funktioniert ähnlich wie AWS. **Kein Client VPN.** AWS Client VPN → OpenVPN auf ECS oder WireGuard self-hosted. **Tunnel-Redundanz.** OTC erstellt standardmäßig nur einen Tunnel — für HA zwei VPN-Verbindungen konfigurieren. BGP über VPN ist eingeschränkt (statische Routen bevorzugt). **Fehlend.** Accelerated VPN (Global Accelerator Integration) gibt es nicht.
migration.en: **Site-to-site VPN.** OTC VPN Gateway supports IPsec IKEv1/v2 and works similarly to AWS. **No Client VPN.** AWS Client VPN → OpenVPN on ECS or WireGuard self-hosted. **Tunnel redundancy.** OTC creates only one tunnel by default — configure two VPN connections for HA. BGP over VPN is limited (static routes preferred). **Missing.** Accelerated VPN (Global Accelerator integration) does not exist.

desc.de: Privater Zugriff auf AWS-Services und eigene Services über VPC Endpoints. Interface Endpoints (ENI-basiert), Gateway Endpoints (S3, DynamoDB). PrivateLink Service für eigene Service-Exposition.
desc.en: Private access to AWS services and own services via VPC endpoints. Interface endpoints (ENI-based), gateway endpoints (S3, DynamoDB). PrivateLink service for own service exposure.

otcDesc.de: Privater Zugriff auf OTC-Services über VPC Endpoints. Interface Endpoints für OBS, DNS und weitere OTC-Services. Eigene Services über VPC Endpoint Services exponieren.
otcDesc.en: Private access to OTC services via VPC endpoints. Interface endpoints for OBS, DNS and other OTC services. Expose own services via VPC Endpoint Services.

alt.de: VPC Peering + Security Groups, Proxy auf ECS (Nginx/HAProxy), NAT Gateway für OTC-Service-Zugriff
alt.en: VPC Peering + security groups, proxy on ECS (Nginx/HAProxy), NAT Gateway for OTC service access

migration.de: **Endpoint-Typen.** VPCEP unterstützt Gateway Endpoints (OBS, DIS) und Interface Endpoints, aber deutlich weniger OTC-Services haben Endpoint-Support als AWS. **Kein Policy-Modell.** Endpoint Policies gibt es nicht — Zugriffskontrolle nur über Security Groups. **Eigene Services.** PrivateLink für eigene Services → VPCEP Service erstellen (Whitelist-basiert). Cross-Account Endpoint Sharing ist eingeschränkt. **DNS-Abweichung.** DNS-Integration funktioniert anders — kein privates DNS wie bei AWS Interface Endpoints.
migration.en: **Endpoint types.** VPCEP supports Gateway Endpoints (OBS, DIS) and Interface Endpoints, but significantly fewer OTC services support endpoints than AWS. **No policy model.** Endpoint Policies don't exist — access control only via Security Groups. **Own services.** PrivateLink for own services → create VPCEP Service (whitelist-based). Cross-account endpoint sharing is limited. **DNS difference.** DNS integration works differently — no private DNS like AWS Interface Endpoints.

equivNote.de: VPCEP bietet Interface und Gateway Endpoints für ausgewählte OTC-Services (OBS, DNS, DIS u.a.) und eigene Endpoint Services. Deutlich weniger Service-Integrationen als AWS (~20 vs. 100+), keine Endpoint Policies, kein PrivateLink Marketplace.
equivNote.en: VPCEP provides interface and gateway endpoints for selected OTC services (OBS, DNS, DIS etc.) and own endpoint services. Significantly fewer service integrations than AWS (~20 vs. 100+), no endpoint policies, no PrivateLink marketplace.

desc.de: Service-to-Service Networking auf VPC-Ebene. Vereinfacht Verbindungen zwischen Services über VPCs, Accounts und Compute-Typen (ECS, EKS, Lambda, EC2) ohne Sidecars. IAM-basierte Auth, Traffic Splitting, Observability.
desc.en: Service-to-service networking at VPC level. Simplifies connections between services across VPCs, accounts and compute types (ECS, EKS, Lambda, EC2) without sidecars. IAM-based auth, traffic splitting, observability.

otcDesc.de: Managed Istio-basiertes Service Mesh. mTLS, Traffic Management (Canary, Blue/Green), Circuit Breaker, Distributed Tracing, AuthorizationPolicies. Sidecar-basiert (Envoy). Nur für Workloads im CCE Cluster, nicht VPC-übergreifend.
otcDesc.en: Managed Istio-based service mesh. mTLS, traffic management (canary, blue/green), circuit breaker, distributed tracing, authorization policies. Sidecar-based (Envoy). Only for workloads in CCE clusters, not cross-VPC.

migration.de: **Architekturunterschiede.** VPC Lattice arbeitet ohne Sidecars auf VPC-Ebene — ASM ist Sidecar-basiert (Envoy/Istio). Lattice verbindet Services über VPCs und Compute-Typen hinweg — ASM nur innerhalb eines CCE Clusters. **Auth.** Lattice nutzt IAM Policies — ASM nutzt Istio AuthorizationPolicies (ServiceAccount-basiert). **Traffic Management.** Beide unterstützen Weighted Routing/Canary. **Fehlend.** Kein cross-VPC Service Discovery, kein serverless-zu-K8s Bridging. Für managed Services (DMS Kafka, GeminiDB) zusätzlich SASL/Credentials + Security Groups nötig.
migration.en: **Architecture differences.** VPC Lattice works without sidecars at VPC level — ASM is sidecar-based (Envoy/Istio). Lattice connects services across VPCs and compute types — ASM only within a CCE cluster. **Auth.** Lattice uses IAM policies — ASM uses Istio AuthorizationPolicies (ServiceAccount-based). **Traffic management.** Both support weighted routing/canary. **Missing.** No cross-VPC service discovery, no serverless-to-K8s bridging. For managed services (DMS Kafka, GeminiDB) additional SASL/credentials + security groups required.

equivNote.de: ASM ist funktional ein Service Mesh (Istio), kein direktes VPC Lattice-Äquivalent. Lattice ist leichtgewichtiger (kein Sidecar), ASM ist feature-reicher (mTLS, Tracing, Circuit Breaker).
equivNote.en: ASM is functionally a service mesh (Istio), not a direct VPC Lattice equivalent. Lattice is more lightweight (no sidecar), ASM is more feature-rich (mTLS, tracing, circuit breaker).

tfNote.de: Terraform kann das Mesh erstellen (opentelekomcloud_asm_service_mesh_v1). Traffic Policies, AuthorizationPolicies etc. werden per kubectl/Istio CRDs konfiguriert.
tfNote.en: Terraform can create the mesh (opentelekomcloud_asm_service_mesh_v1). Traffic policies, authorization policies etc. are configured via kubectl/Istio CRDs.
